case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. NAIPENG WU

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, NAIPENG $7,275.88 PRINCIPAL, $301.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,576.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77751655)
